motif_match.next_action: Narrow directly to tentative-to-committed state promotion in the implicated subsystem.
motif_match.avoid: Avoid broad multi-subsystem exploration before validating the promotion path.
motif_match.search_scope: State channel transition points and the policy/rule reader that consumes committed state.

motif_non_match.next_action: Deprioritize this motif and investigate the next likely bug class from incident evidence.
motif_non_match.avoid: Avoid editing promotion/commit logic as the first step.
motif_non_match.search_scope: Rule/lookup/mapping/normalization/config paths directly evidenced by the incident.

ambiguous.next_action: Request exactly one discriminating incident evidence check before broader code search.
ambiguous.avoid: Avoid forcing motif match/non-match without the discriminating check.
ambiguous.search_scope: Single narrow instrumentation/check at the decision point that can resolve ambiguity.
